name: Ajavion Gardner

ai_summary: Ajavion Gardner brings over 5 years of formal early childhood education experience as a lead teacher, assistant teacher, and facilitator, demonstrating strong classroom leadership. She employs a calm, child-centered conflict resolution approach and is passionate about creating safe, supportive environments where children feel seen and heard.
